name: Crispy Berry Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Place butter in a 2-quart casserole dish.
Heat the butter in the oven until melted.
Combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl until blended. Stir in milk to make batter. Pour over butter in the casserole dish; do not stir.
Combine berries and sugar, tossing to coat. Spoon on top of the batter; do not stir.
Cover bottom rack of oven with foil to catch drips. Bake pudding for 1 hour or until the top is golden brown. Serve warm or at room temperature.
